Join 10,000+ households reducing food waste

Stop Wasting Food.
Start Saving Money.

SavePlate helps you track your food inventory, donate surplus items, plan meals, and measure your environmental impact — all in one place.

Get Started Free Sign In

Everything You Need to Reduce Food Waste

A complete toolkit for managing your food sustainably and efficiently.

Smart Inventory

Track expiry dates and get alerts before food goes bad.

Donate Food

Share surplus food with neighbours and local charities.

Meal Planner

AI-powered weekly plans built from what you already have.

Impact Analytics

See how much food, money, and CO₂ you've saved.

How SavePlate Works

Three simple steps to a more sustainable kitchen.

01

Add Your Food

Scan barcodes or manually add items from your fridge, pantry, and freezer with expiry dates.

02

Get Smart Alerts

Receive timely notifications when items are nearing expiry so nothing gets forgotten.

03

Act & Impact

Cook from your inventory, donate surplus food, and track your sustainability score.

Why 10,000+ Households Choose SavePlate

  • Reduce household food waste by up to 40%
  • Save £50+ per month on grocery bills
  • Earn sustainability badges and community recognition
  • Help local food banks and neighbours in need
